functional_requirements.title: Multimodal Input
functional_requirements.description: Accept text (up to 4000 chars), images, files (PDF, DOCX, XLSX up to 20MB, max 5 attachments), and voice (Voice-to-Text).

functional_requirements.title: Multimodal Output
functional_requirements.description: Return text, images (DALL-E/Midjourney), and Text-to-Speech audio.

functional_requirements.title: Web Search Integration
functional_requirements.description: Auto-detect intent requiring live data; call Tavily/Serper API; inject results as context before routing to LLM. Show citations [1],[2] and reference links. Fallback message if search fails.

functional_requirements.title: Model Routing
functional_requirements.description: Auto-select optimal model (Groq for speed on short queries <50 words; GPT-4o/Claude 3.5 for complex/file tasks) or allow manual selection via model_preference field.

functional_requirements.title: Long-term Memory – Extraction
functional_requirements.description: After each conversation, run a background job to extract and store 'User Facts' (name, preferences, events) into the Vector Database linked by user_id.

functional_requirements.title: Long-term Memory – RAG Retrieval
functional_requirements.description: At the start of each new chat, query the Vector DB for relevant memories and inject them into the System Prompt as context.

functional_requirements.title: Webhook Messaging Integration
functional_requirements.description: Connect with Telegram and Zalo via webhooks. Map incoming messages to the internal messages table and stream responses back. Support /newchat, /summary, /mode commands.

functional_requirements.title: Real-time Cloud Sync
functional_requirements.description: Chat history must sync in real-time between Web and Mobile App.

non_functional_requirements.title: Performance
non_functional_requirements.description: Time to First Token (TTFT) must be under 2 seconds for fast models (Groq/Llama3).

non_functional_requirements.title: Security
non_functional_requirements.description: All conversation data encrypted at rest and in transit. API keys encrypted in DB. No sensitive info (passwords, credit cards) stored from chat content.

non_functional_requirements.title: Scalability
non_functional_requirements.description: Microservices architecture (Docker/Kubernetes) to allow adding new LLM providers without downtime.

non_functional_requirements.title: API Timeout
non_functional_requirements.description: LLM API requests must not exceed 30 seconds. On timeout, return 'Model Timeout' error and suggest a lighter model.

non_functional_requirements.title: File Size Limit
non_functional_requirements.description: Maximum 20MB per file upload. Long documents are auto-chunked into a temporary Vector Store before chat.

edge_cases.title: Primary Provider Down (Failover)
edge_cases.scenario: OpenAI or primary LLM API is unavailable.
edge_cases.handling: Auto-failover to backup provider (Anthropic or Google) within 3 seconds. Notify user with a subtle status message.

edge_cases.title: Toxic / Harmful Content
edge_cases.scenario: User requests content violating safety policy (sexual, hate speech, violence).
edge_cases.handling: Run Moderation Layer BEFORE routing to LLM. Return default refusal: 'Tôi không thể hỗ trợ yêu cầu này vì vi phạm chính sách an toàn.'

edge_cases.title: Context Window Overflow
edge_cases.scenario: Conversation token count exceeds model's context limit.
edge_cases.handling: Implement Sliding Window: summarize the oldest messages to free context space while preserving recency.

edge_cases.title: Stream Disconnect
edge_cases.scenario: Network drops while AI is streaming a response.
edge_cases.handling: Client displays 'Connection lost' icon. Save partial chunks to LocalStorage. Auto-retry from last received token on reconnect.

edge_cases.title: Spam / Rate Limit
edge_cases.handling: Rate limit by IP and account (max 10 messages/minute). Return 403 with Captcha prompt or cooldown timer. Token quota checked via Redis before each request.

edge_cases.title: Password-Protected File
edge_cases.scenario: User uploads a PDF with a password lock.
edge_cases.handling: Return error: 'File này bị khóa, vui lòng mở khóa trước khi gửi.'

edge_cases.title: Contradictory Memory
edge_cases.scenario: User provides conflicting preferences across sessions.
edge_cases.handling: AI prioritizes the most recent fact and overwrites the old record in the Vector Database.

user_stories.title: Multimodal Input
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Text input max 4000 chars (adjustable per model)
AC2: Up to 5 attachments — JPG, PNG, PDF, DOCX, XLSX
AC3: Voice input shows audio-wave animation; auto Voice-to-Text before sending

user_stories.title: Streaming Response
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Text rendered via SSE (Server-Sent Events) streaming
AC2: 'Stop Generating' button to interrupt mid-stream
AC3: Action buttons after each response: Copy, Like/Dislike, Re-generate

user_stories.title: Real-time Web Search
acceptance_criteria: AC1: System auto-detects intent; triggers Search API for live data queries
AC2: Citations shown as [1],[2] with reference list at response end
AC3: Fallback message if Search API fails

user_stories.title: Long-term Memory
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Background job extracts 'User Facts' after conversation ends
AC2: Facts stored in Vector DB keyed by user_id
AC3: Relevant facts injected into System Prompt at chat start

user_stories.title: Telegram / Zalo Integration
acceptance_criteria: AC1: QR code or link to connect Web account with Telegram/Zalo bot
AC2: Bot messages synced back to Web/Mobile chat history

user_stories.title: Smart Model Routing
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Short/simple queries (<50 words) routed to Groq Llama3
AC2: Complex queries or file attachments routed to GPT-4o or Claude 3.5 Sonnet
AC3: On 5xx error from any provider, auto-retry with another provider within 3 seconds

tech_stack.cache: Redis — session storage, rate limiting, daily quota

daily_usage.notes: Updated after every completed message. Checked via Redis before processing.

step_1_intent_classification.complex_or_files: Route to Claude 3.5 Sonnet or GPT-4o

orchestrator_logic.step_2_context_injection: Query Vector DB for user memories → append to System Prompt
orchestrator_logic.step_3_failover: On 429 or 5xx → switch to next provider in fallback list

ui_layout.sidebar: Conversation history, folders, profile, daily quota meter
ui_layout.chat_window_header: Conversation title + active model badge (e.g. ⚡ Groq-Llama3)

smart_input_bar.plus_icon: Menu: Upload File, Camera, Web Search toggle

interactive_responses.inline_citation: Click [1] → opens side-panel with source content
